-compatible models manually or import th: -compatible models manually or import them from the /models endpoint.
— queries all models in parallel, then a: — interroge tous les modèles en parallèle, puis un juge synthétise une réponse. Meilleure qualité, mais coûte le plus cher : chaque demande facture tous les modèles de jury + le juge (appels N+1)
— rotates models across requests to spre: — rotates models across requests to spread load
— sends image/PDF/audio requests to a mo: — sends image/PDF/audio requests to a model that supports them first
— tries models in order (next on failure: — tries models in order (next on failure)
